sections.paragraph:
Jonadab H3122
1. Nephew of David:
- His complicity with Amnon in his rape of Tamar
2Sa 13:5
- Comforts David on death of Amnon
2Sa 13:35
2. Called Jehonadab:
- A Rechabite and companion of Jehu
2Ki 10:23
- His sons refuse to drink wine in obedience to his command
Jer 35:10; Jer 35:19
Rechabites
